reviews.review_text:
[h1] 5/10 [/h1]
I used to play this game with my friend a lot, sadly it is dead and abandoned. There are a lot of cheaters and I think one of the reasons game died is them and devs not doing anything about it, sad.

One of my fav games of all time, super fun, low spec friendly, and one of the only games that gets that chaos from a 250 person lobby. it felt like actual war a chaos with super awesome enviorment

Now... its dead :( barely 1 server can fill up, hasnt been updated for years, and it died.

could've been one of my most played games if they just kept their updates

I even bought the support edition because i loved it sooo much,... :(

This game will be remembered in retrospective videos as a game from the early 2020s that was extremely fun for a few months before vanishing into the wind. It will be a textbook example of how early access can do far more harm than good. When the game was first released, it really could have been a Battlefield killer. Packed lobbies, tons of unique game modes and maps in the pipeline, and super accessible for even those with lower spec PCs. Only those who played the first few months will understand just how fun it was with all the role players frolicking throughout the maps and screaming into the mic. I remember one dude roleplaying a drill sergeant, telling people things like "Don't complain soldier, you knew what you signed up for!". Unfortunately, those days are gone because the game got stale. One year ago when I was still playing weekly, there would be at least two full lobbies on the American server. Now it's a miracle if one fills up. I honestly don't see the game recovering unless it goes free or the price is reduced. Dev blogs are being posted but I honestly doubt any update is coming, and if it does, it is already YEARS TOO LATE. As someone who truly loved the game, I can't foresee myself coming back to play it if the update is ever released. The game had a time and a place, and that time has passed along with the momentum that would have kept me playing.

Used to be a good game till they ghosted the community for years leaving them with a cliff hanger of doing a big update to the game. Coincidently they came back into the fray when BF6 came out talking about that big update they promised years ago. Well it's too little to late and honestly just seems like a desperate cry for attention rather than a real attempt at fixing the core issues killing the game.

Devs gave up on a multimillion dollar opportunity with all the hype this game had, but threw it away and have added close to zero new content since.

Do not reccomend

Genuinely one of the best war-sims I've ever played, competing with the best from other franchises that share the genre. Extremely fun gunplay and movement mechanics in a simple, easy to run game environment. Some of the most fun I've ever had was with the VOIP proximity chat in Battlebit. Unfortunately, when the devs went to work on the "overhaul" update, they left it with less than a skeleton crew. After the 2+ years of basically complete silence from the devs the servers are dead and cheaters are rampant. Its because of this that I could not recommend anyone spend money on this game, even though I love it so much. If it manages to bounce back, definitely give it a shot.

Was an amazing game on release, updates were promised but never came and now the community is dead.
Devs appeared late last year to for a playtest but it's too little too late.
Cheaters across the board and devs seemed to completely abandon the game altogether

Out of 200+ games in my life and very few reviews. I can say without a doubt this is the worst game I've ever dared to play and support. Even the steam "Early Access Game" isn't a public announcement its a warning. Note: "The last update made by the developers was over 2 years ago. The information and timeline described by the developers here may no longer be up to date." and boy was steam right like always. Leave this and the devs alone for good. AI slop would of performed better then these scammers. Oh did I mention it was a scam? It is.

6/10
A good game in early access however lack of updates has killed the community leaving servers sparce and significantly less fun than at its peak. you can still find servers however they are more empty and doesn't provide the original game experience.

If you are playing from anywhere east of Europe, just don't. The game is dead and there are no Asia servers with reasonable ping. It's really disappointing to see this game with an all-time peak of 86k dip to <500 players

A great game abadoned by the devs, had so much potential too.

Also never realised this game was still tagged early access, I could have sworn it was released and I feel it had enough content to no longer be considered in an early access state but I guess not.
Which just makes it even worse that they abandoned (for over 2 years now) the game that was still in an early access state.

Okay so when you can find a game (extremely rare), it's honestly extremely fun. However, the game is basically dead except for a select few servers. I have only seen 2 full games running at the same time, no more than that. It's honestly sad because it's an extremely fun game and it feels polished. If you like faster-paced shooters and a game with good gunplay then this will be fun for you. Until the game gets more players I would suggest waiting on purchasing it though.

game was great at launch. sadly devs we yet to know what they did after the first year. rug pull  wasted time and money. add theres now 3 dev teams on thi im told they now have investors and shareholders.. itttsss just gone so farrrr down hill. its fun as ♥♥♥♥ and a potato can run it but they shafted  all the founders and year one players. i want to mix it games fun the people behind it are sus as hell tho. do i recommend it. right now no. we hear about new content every few months so we look and dont forget but really othing. so wait tell they prove something

DO NOT buy this game right now. Wait and see until the update comes out, if it ever does come out. Game is dead and the updates are at least a year late. Insane that I paid for a limited time beta test.

Only one server that anyone really plays on in my region and the game has gone 2+ years without an update. Reviewing now before the coming update resets the clock.

Stay greedy and stay miserable with your abandoned game. From thousands to barely hundreds playing. Its a DEAD game and I hope people are smart enough to look elsewhere than with these scamming "gaming companies"

The Good: gameplay is top tier. the movement, gunplay, progression, and optimization make the game feel fantastic. Based on gameplay alone, in 2026 it plays better than most shooters.

The Bad: the playerbase is gone. Only a few servers run during the day making it difficult to find full lobbies. It would be amazing to see a resurgence in players.  I very much miss the chaotic prox chat that made this game feel alive.
really funt game alot of diffrent things you can do good destruction and you can play it ona potoato

Honestly its alright. Not really what im personally looking for in a shooter. Also most of the servers are empty besides the 127v127 mode. The freeways arent that bad at least. I like how you can get high fps but I really dont like the way it looks. Graphics of course arent anything!

It was great fun at the start. Unfortunately, the developers have shown no interest in communicating with the community or in further developing the game. That’s a real shame, as there was already a solid foundation for a good game.
Given these missteps, I think it’s questionable whether we should continue to give the developers and the game another chance. Trust has been betrayed, and the players deserve compensation.

asian/OCE servers are dead, like daed dead. ultra dead. can't find any room with people in these servers now. oh well. it was fun when it was launched. but now... i can't recommend this game to gamers in Asia/OCE

It keeps making my inputs stick. I have occasionally stood around in the open when trying to not stand in the open, or just outright walked off of buildings. Didn't do this until I stopped playing about two years ago. Wish I lived in the EU so I could get my money back. I rarely get genuinely mad at developers. It's a hard gig, y'know? I try to be polite to you, but honestly? ♥♥♥♥ you guys, ♥♥♥♥ your ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ game, ♥♥♥♥ your lack of fixing anything, and ♥♥♥♥ making it literally unplayable for two whole years. I feel like I've been taken advantage of for living in the US.
game was fun when it was launched, afterwards its just been a slugfest
devs abandoned this game, literally snatching defeat from the jaws of victory

Honestly, this game is not bad.  I don't have many hours as I have just played this solo over the years, but severely disappointed to see that any type of solo gameplay has been removed. It was fun to turn my brain off and not need to be so competitive for once,  unlike every other game. It appears the only way to play this game is if you play multiplayer which it seems only really one server is worth playing at any given time and it's usually full. I'm not sure why you would remove preexisting features that were enjoyable and costs nothing, but what do I know about game development. As a consumer this is very clearly anti-fun.

Another game that lived and died in Early Access, though tragically this game was very good. 

This game died from a meta that slowly went stale, a playerbase that gradually dwindled away, and developers who couldn't find a way to fully release the game and got tired of working on it. If they come back with even just some balance revisions, a map or two, and decent outreach/advertisement this game could very well grow back, but if you're seeing this and this game is somehow STILL Early Access just pass on it.

This game now is exactly how it was when it launched, Not a bad this particularly but the game shows no sign of development from the devs and is probably abandoned. Player count is high enough to fill up three 300 player lobbies during the day but I wouldnt expect that to be the case for long. Enjoy it while it lasts because this truly is better than battlefield 6 and it sucks the devs care so little
Fun at launch, not anymore, 300 daily players and abandoned by devs
abandonware, had a really good potential but was ruined by the game being literally left in a ditch, DO NOT BUY

Reddit game that went obscure after the "sappot muh indie dev" fad ended. Absolutely has no playerbase anywhere in SEA as of writing this. Heck, the server browser only had one 254/254 NA server active, the second largest one was only 2/254.

I wouldn't recommend this unless your in NA where atleast you could play it properly when the remaining 250+ people are still active.

The devs blew it, the game was amazing, and they went radio silent for over 2 years, and now promise an update that aint coming and is over two years due. Just play bf6 at this point, its pathetically sad how such a great game just got abandonded and we will never know why.

Battlebit will always hold a special place in my heart, I remember skipping school to play this masterpiece, it bought me and my friends closer together and created wonderful memories with the lads. However as with all great games, it was eventually ruined with the large number of sweats that just flooded each server and would drop shot in a fcking block game.
Due to a lack of 13 Werewolves i can't give this game a positive Rating. Its a fun game though

The game itself is somewhat okay'ish but is not anything special.

This game was really fun and worth it in 2022-2023. Now the devs left it and more and more people left it,
I wish that there was a comeback to this game.

This game just is so dead. It also loves to compleatly crash my pc. I have no idea why, and I have no intention of fixing it because no one ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ plays this anymore let alone use the voice chat. Don't buy this it's not worth the one server thats running :(

The blatant use of cheats and the lack of a player base makes this game not worth the buy.  I think there are more cheaters in every lobby than legit players.  You can view how many reports people have received from other players recently and these same folks are in every lobby since the game is so dead there's limited active games.  Game would be pretty fun with active devs and a player base but I don't see that happening.  Obligatory, get gud, gg, skill issue.

Just because I'm bad at the game and communication from the developers has been lacking doesn't mean it isn't a jolly jape. It embodies the ethos of old school battlefield while doing it's own thing. I think you should give it a go.

8/10
runs on Linux 
bought this for my friend and he rage quit then refunded the gift +++ great game would recommend

May 2026: to anyone reading the other negative reviews "game is abandoned and has been for years" etc etc.. no it isn't. I got 25 servers right now SMACK FULL! so to say the game is abandoned and dead is just a lie.
Game is like a minecraft/block version of battlefield! similar easy to jump in and just start blowing stuff up, the world is destructible like a lego set lol.
graphics looks alot better than 4 years ago when i played it, but you can see in the store page on the pictures yourself the type of graphics. 
Classes are similar to that of battlefield.
if you find it on sale i absolutely recommend it for easy and fun action!
Runs on a 3060 12gb, 16gb ddr4 ram and 5600x without issue.

DON'T LISTEN TO THE NEGATIVE REVIEWS! This game is worth it.

The Good:
- The devs ARE updating the game.
- The gun physics are so damn good (including quick-scope snipers), I keep coming back even though i play on 180 ping, it's fantastic.
- The overall quality of things you can do from leaning, combining clips and the MASSIVE range of weapon mods are just beautiful.
- The Map destruction is great!
- The proximity chat can lead to some of the best gaming moments you've ever had.
- The map sizes and games in them can really make it feel like a battlefield we never got
- The medics actually get themselves killed trying to revive you.

The ACTUAL bad:
- The game is DYING but NOT DEAD.
- Because it's only the last few people who love this game, if you're in eu, you're only getting to play at night when the playerbase is online, BUT THAT SERVER IS WORTH PLAYING IN!
- There isn't much of a reason to keep coming back in the grinding perspective.


What I hope the devs will see and maybe can help rebuild our playerbase:
- make the game free to boost playerbase and introduce seperate paid items
- make more skins purchaseable from guns to player skins
- A battlepass to keep revenue generating and introducing a reason for players to grind
- accolade displaying - when killed by a player let them display accolades like Sniper Mastery
- Banners / player cards for killed screen, make it customizable like call of duty or earnable.
- Slower Level Progression! Up the level cap to 1000. Give players a reason to do weeklys.
- add more weapons even if it's ww2 weapons we'll eat that sh** up!
- allow paying players the ability to get acess to new weapons BEFORE they are released to all free players. (incentive)
- Create weekly leaderboards and reward players on their position.
- Weekly leaderboards can even be custom like Grenade kills and rewarded the top 1000 players with a banner representing it
- Soldier Ranks per season, creating seasons around a battepass and rewarding soldiers on their achieved rank will make them want to grind. the level can even just be pushed by kills in example, rewarded by a tag and / or banner.
- Clan incentives, give people an XP boost for healing, supplying, etc for squads and even more for clan members and friends.
- Make new weapons weapon proficient unlocks. (unlocking glock requires 60 kills m4a1, 10 spot assists, etc)
- Add more secondary weapons including small sawed off shotguns for snipers to feel more dangerous at close range
- Add the Que system. at night we currently only have 1 full server. we have to spam click to get in when a spot opens. add a que system to allow players to click join, be placed in a que and we can doom scroll while we wait.
- Be more harsh on the community, up the anti cheat and BAN them!
- Optionally, create player trading. allow for certain skins and / or other items to be traded by players in game along with an ingame currency (that you can only get with real money). Players who start playing the game late will now have the chance of getting items from old battle passes or events, and can massively boost the economy of the game and fund the games future development.

Devs and players. This game is too good to be left for dead. Not when the devs actually tried to build something so good for us fps gamers. Don't overlook this game, even if you only get to play on one server at night when everyone is online. it is so worth it. If you own the game already, open it for one more game and remember how good it really is.
i wouldnt care if you update your game or not, but you said 2 years ago you were going to.  SO UPDATE YOUR ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ GAME
